keyFactors: Argentina's significantly higher ELO rating and recent strong form.
Jordan's lower weighted form and recent performance history.
Neutral venue mitigates potential home advantage for Jordan.
risks: Potential impact of Argentina's key player's injury on team performance.
Unpredictability due to no head-to-head history between the teams.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Großer Elo-Unterschied (1749 vs. 1508) zugunsten Argentiniens; Argentinien zeigt exzellente Form (gewichtete Form 2.55, recentForm 2.5) und sehr starke Defensive (0.40 Gegentore/Spiel, Clean-Sheet-Rate 0.63); Jordaniens Defensive anfällig (1.54 Gegentore/Spiel, Clean-Sheet-Rate nur 0.36).
